---
name: Skill request
about: Propose a new skill or a major improvement to an existing one
title: "[skill] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What repeatable task is not handled well today?

## Proposed Skill

Describe the trigger, workflow, and expected output.

## Inputs

What files, systems, or context would the skill need?

## Risks

Call out safety concerns, ambiguity, or maintenance cost.
